docs.title: 👤 Yangmei Lin · 林仰梅
docs.text:
Fitz is my online name — the one I go by most.

I'm a developer, writer, and lifelong learner. I enjoy building useful things, sharing what I learn through writing, and capturing life through photos and words.

我是 林仰梅，网名 Fitz。 热爱写代码、写文字和用镜头记录生活。

docs.title: Building This Site · 搭建这个网站
docs.text:
This site runs on MkDocs Material hosted on GitHub Pages — free, fast, and fully under my control. Here's how I put it together.

这个网站用 MkDocs Material 搭建，部署在 GitHub Pages 上——免费、快速，完全掌控在自己手里。

docs.title: Why MkDocs Material? · 为什么选 MkDocs Material？
docs.text:
I looked at several options:

Option Pros Cons MkDocs Material Clean design, fast, Python-based Less flexible than code-heavy options Hugo Very fast Go templating learning curve Jekyll Huge ecosystem Ruby dependency, slower Next.js Ultimate flexibility Overkill for a personal site

MkDocs Material won because it looks great out of the box and lets me focus on writing rather than configuring.

docs.title: 1. Install dependencies · 安装依赖
docs.text: pip install mkdocs-material

docs.title: 2. Create the project · 创建项目
docs.text:
mkdocs new my-site
cd my-site

docs.title: 3. Configure mkdocs.yml
docs.text:
site_name: My Site
theme:
  name: material
  palette:
    primary: indigo

docs.title: 4. Preview locally · 本地预览
docs.text: mkdocs serve

docs.title: 5. Deploy to GitHub Pages · 部署到 GitHub Pages
docs.text:
Push to GitHub, and GitHub Actions takes care of the rest. See the .github/workflows/deploy.yml in this repo.

推送到 GitHub，GitHub Actions 自动完成部署。

docs.title: Key Features I Use · 我用到的功能
docs.text:
• Blog plugin — built-in blog with categories, tags, authors
  • Search — full-text search with Chinese support
  • Dark/Light mode — auto-detects system preference
  • Grid cards — clean layout for projects and sections
  • Mermaid diagrams — for flowcharts and architecture diagrams

That's it! The whole setup takes about an hour. I'll keep updating this post as the site evolves.

整个搭建过程大概一小时就够了。随着网站更新，这篇文章也会持续完善。

docs.title: Hello World! · 你好，世界！
docs.text:
Welcome to my corner of the internet. 👋

This is my first blog post, and I'm starting with the classic Hello World — fitting for a developer's personal site.

docs.title: Why this site? · 为什么建这个站？
docs.text:
I've always wanted a place that's truly mine — not a social media feed, not a résumé, but a space where I can:

  • Share technical things I learn and build
  • Write about life, travel, and whatever's on my mind
  • Keep a record for future-me to look back on

docs.title: What to expect · 这里会有什么
docs.text:
Technical posts — tutorials, tool reviews, project write-ups.

Life posts — travel diaries, coffee shop reviews, book notes, random reflections.

Projects — a showcase of things I build.

docs.title: A note on bilingual content · 关于双语内容
docs.text:
I'll write in both English and Chinese. Some posts might be mostly one language, some will be fully bilingual — it depends on what feels right for the topic.

写作会用中英双语。有些文章以英文为主，有些会完全双语——根据话题决定。

Here's to building in public. 🚀

Next post: [Your next topic here]
